hero.title: WiederBau
hero.subtitle: PVC & ALU Joinery
hero.tagline: German Quality in the Heart of Vojvodina
hero.description: A family company with over 25 years of experience in PVC and ALU joinery installation, roller blinds, and mosquito nets.

about.paragraph1: WiederBau is a family business from Sombor with over 25 years of experience in PVC and ALU joinery. From the very beginning, our mission has been to provide every client with top quality and precise installation.
about.paragraph2: We exclusively use VEKA German profiles and ALUMIL aluminum systems — brands that guarantee durability, energy efficiency, and modern design. From measurement to final installation, every step is done professionally and with care.
about.paragraph3: Our team of experts covers the entire Vojvodina region — from Sombor, through Odžaci and Apatin, to Subotica. We are proud of every completed project and satisfied client.

services.pvcDesc: High-quality PVC windows and doors with VEKA 5-chamber profiles for maximum energy efficiency and sound insulation.
services.aluDesc: Premium ALUMIL aluminum systems for a modern look and exceptional performance. Ideal for large glass surfaces.
services.terraceDesc: ALUMIL sliding walls that close the terrace but never separate it from nature. Enjoy the view all year round.
services.blindsDesc: Installation and repair of all types of roller blinds — PVC, aluminum, and electric blinds for your home's security and comfort.
services.netsDesc: Custom-made mosquito nets — fixed, sliding, and roller systems to protect against insects.
services.repairDesc: Fast and reliable service for all types of PVC and ALU joinery. Glass, hardware, lock, and seal replacement.

products.aluDesc: ALUMIL systems offer modern design and exceptional performance for large glass surfaces:

whyUs.stat1Desc: A family company with a tradition of quality since 1999
whyUs.stat2Desc: We exclusively use proven German and European profiles
whyUs.stat3Desc: From measurement and consulting to production and professional installation
whyUs.stat4Desc: We help you apply for government energy efficiency subsidies

areas.description: Our team covers Sombor and the wider region. Contact us for your location — we come to your address for free measurement.

footer.description: A family company with over 25 years of experience in PVC and ALU joinery installation. German quality in the heart of Vojvodina.
